banner.title: We respect your privacy
banner.description: Webble uses cookies, pixels, tags and similar technologies to provide you with a personalized experience. With your consent, we can show you tailored content and improve our services.

modal.title: Consent
modal.intro_text: We use cookies for the proper functioning of the site and to provide you with a personalized experience. Manage your preferences below or for more information visit

functional.title: Functional
functional.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function and ensure a safe and optimized browsing experience. They cannot be disabled.

marketing.title: Marketing
marketing.description: These cookies help us improve our service by analyzing how you use the site and show you personalized content on Webble and partner platforms like Google and social media.

policy.title: Cookie Policy
policy.subtitle: Information on the use of cookies on Webble Studio

intro.title: What are cookies?
intro.text1: Cookies are small text files that are stored on your device when you visit a website. They are used to make the site work efficiently and provide information to site owners.
intro.text2: Webble Studio uses cookies and similar technologies (pixels, tags, etc.) to ensure the proper functioning of the site and to offer you a personalized experience.

functional.title: Functional Cookies
functional.description: These cookies are essential for the website to function and ensure a safe and optimized browsing experience. They cannot be disabled.

vercel.name: Vercel
vercel.data_text: Usage data, Various types of data as specified in the service privacy policy
vercel.description_text: Vercel is a hosting and backend service provided by Vercel Inc. that allows the website to function properly and ensures the necessary performance for navigation.

marketing_section.title: Marketing Cookies
marketing_section.description: These cookies help us improve our service by analyzing how you use the site and show you personalized content on Webble and partner platforms like Google and social media. You can disable them at any time through cookie settings.

ga4.name: Google Analytics 4
ga4.purpose_text: Site usage analysis and user behavior tracking
ga4.data_text: Pages visited, time spent, interactions, anonymized IP address, device data, browser information
ga4.description_text: Google Analytics 4 is a web analytics service provided by Google LLC. It allows collecting anonymous statistics to improve user experience and better understand how visitors interact with the site.
ga4.privacy_text: Data is anonymized and used exclusively for statistical purposes. For more information:

gtm.name: Google Tag Manager
gtm.purpose_text: Tag management and user event tracking
gtm.data_text: Interaction events (button clicks, scroll, form submit), page navigation, behavioral data
gtm.description_text: Google Tag Manager is a tag management service provided by Google LLC. It allows tracking user interactions on the site (such as CTA button clicks, form submissions, navigation) to better understand user behavior and optimize the experience.
gtm.privacy_text: To learn about Google's use of Data, see their
gtm.cookies_note: Google Tag Manager does not create its own cookies. It is a management tool that facilitates loading other services (such as Google Analytics). Cookies are created by services loaded through GTM.

legal_basis.title: Legal Basis for Processing
legal_basis.functional_article: Legitimate interest (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. f of GDPR)
legal_basis.functional_text: These cookies are necessary for the website to function and do not require your consent as they are essential to provide the requested services.
legal_basis.marketing_article: Explicit consent (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. a of GDPR)
legal_basis.marketing_text: These cookies require your explicit consent. You can revoke consent at any time through the site's cookie settings.

transfers.title: International Data Transfers
transfers.us_company_title: Company Based in the United States
transfers.us_company_text1: is a company incorporated and operating in the
transfers.us_company_text2: However, we are committed to respecting the
transfers.us_company_text3: for all users from the European Union.
transfers.us_company_text4: Your data may be transferred and stored on our servers in the United States, in compliance with the guarantees provided by GDPR for international transfers.
transfers.google_text1: When you accept marketing cookies, we use the following Google LLC (United States) services:
transfers.google_text2: Google LLC is certified under the
transfers.google_text3: which ensures an adequate level of protection for data transfers from the EU to the USA. Additionally, Google has implemented

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.intro: Data collected through cookies is retained for the following periods:
retention.functional_text: Retained for the duration of the session or according to the technical needs of the service
retention.marketing_text: Up to 24 months (Google Analytics) or until consent is revoked
retention.validity_text: Your consent to marketing cookies is valid for
retention.validity_text2: After this period, you will be asked to express your preferences again. However, you can revoke or modify consent at any time using the "Cookie Settings" button always visible at the bottom right of the site.

consequences.title: Rejection Consequences
consequences.intro: If you decide to reject marketing cookies, the site will continue to work normally, but:
consequences.note: Rejecting marketing cookies does NOT affect your ability to use the site. It is a completely free and reversible choice at any time.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR), you have the following rights regarding your personal data:
rights.access_text: Obtain confirmation that data processing is underway and access your personal data
rights.rectification_text: Obtain rectification of inaccurate personal data or completion of incomplete data
rights.erasure_text: Obtain deletion of your personal data ("right to be forgotten")
rights.restriction_text: Obtain restriction of processing of your personal data
rights.portability_text: Receive your data in a structured format and transmit it to another controller
rights.objection_text: Object to the processing of your personal data for legitimate reasons
rights.withdraw_text: Withdraw consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of previous processing
rights.complaint_text: Lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority
rights.exercise: To exercise one or more of these rights, contact us at
rights.exercise_response: We will respond within 30 days of your request.

authority.title: Supervisory Authority
authority.intro: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the competent supervisory authority if you believe that the processing of your personal data violates GDPR.
authority.name: Italian Data Protection Authority

first_third.title: First & Third-Party
first_third.first_text: These are cookies set directly by our website. We have complete control over these cookies.
first_third.third_text: These are cookies set by external services we use. They are managed by their respective providers.

management.title: Manage Cookies
management.site_text: You can manage your cookie preferences at any time using the
management.site_position: at the bottom right of every page
management.site_note: The button is always present and clickable. It allows you to modify your preferences at any time without having to search for this page.
management.browser_text: You can also manage cookies directly from your browser settings:

privacy_link.title: Privacy Policy
privacy_link.text: For more detailed information on personal data processing, see our
privacy_link.text2: which provides information on all data processing carried out by Webble Studio.

updates.title: Updates
updates.text: This Cookie Policy may be updated periodically. We invite you to consult it regularly to stay informed about how we use cookies. The date of the last update is indicated at the top of the page.

contacts.title: Contacts
contacts.intro: For any questions or requests regarding this Cookie Policy, you can contact us:

intro.text: Webble Studio (Vady Solutions LLC) respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Privacy Policy informs you about how we collect, use, and protect your personal information when you visit our website.

data_collected.title: Personal Data Collected
data_collected.intro: We collect the following types of personal data:
data_collected.booking_items: Name, Surname, Email, Phone, Requested services, Preferred contact method
data_collected.navigation_items: IP address (anonymized), Browser and device, Pages visited, Time spent, Traffic source

purposes.title: Processing Purposes
purposes.intro: Your personal data is used for the following purposes:
purposes.service_text: Respond to your contact requests, manage bookings, and provide requested services
purposes.service_legal: Legal basis: Contract execution (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. b GDPR)
purposes.communication_text: Send you communications related to requested services and, if you gave consent, marketing materials
purposes.communication_legal: Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. a GDPR) for marketing
purposes.analytics_text: Analyze site usage to improve user experience and optimize services
purposes.analytics_legal: Legal basis: Consent (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. a GDPR) for marketing cookies
purposes.security_text: Prevent fraud, ensure site security, and protect rights
purposes.security_legal: Legal basis: Legitimate interest (Art. 6, para. 1, lett. f GDPR)

recipients.title: Data Recipients
recipients.intro: Your personal data may be shared with:
recipients.google_text: Google Analytics and Tag Manager (only with marketing consent)
recipients.note: All service providers are bound by contractual data protection obligations and comply with GDPR-required security standards.

retention.title: Retention Period
retention.intro: Your personal data is retained for the following periods:
retention.analytics_text: 24 months (Google Analytics) or until consent withdrawal
retention.note: After these periods, data is automatically deleted or irreversibly anonymized.

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.intro: In accordance with GDPR, you have the following rights:
rights.access_text: Obtain confirmation of processing and access your personal data
rights.rectification_text: Correct inaccurate data or complete incomplete data
rights.erasure_text: Obtain deletion of your data ("right to be forgotten")
rights.portability_text: Receive your data in structured format
rights.objection_text: Object to processing for legitimate reasons
rights.complaint_text: Lodge a complaint with the Data Protection Authority
rights.exercise: To exercise these rights, contact us at:

transfers.title: International Transfers
transfers.us_title: Company Based in the United States
transfers.us_text: Vady Solutions LLC operates from the United States (Delaware). Your data may be transferred and stored on our servers in the USA, in compliance with GDPR guarantees for international transfers.
transfers.providers_text: We use providers based in the United States:
transfers.guarantees: All providers are certified under the EU-US Data Privacy Framework and have implemented Standard Contractual Clauses (SCC) approved by the European Commission.

security.title: Data Security
security.intro: We adopt appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data:
security.database: Protected databases with authentication and Row Level Security
security.access: Limited data access to authorized personnel only
security.monitoring: Constant monitoring to detect unauthorized access
security.note: Despite security measures, no system is completely secure. We invite you to protect your credentials and report any violations.

cookies_link.text: For detailed information on cookie usage, see our

changes.title: Changes
changes.text: This Privacy Policy may be updated periodically. The date of the last update is indicated above. We invite you to consult it regularly.

authority.title: Supervisory Authority
authority.intro: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Italian Data Protection Authority:
authority.name: Italian Data Protection Authority

contacts.intro: For any questions regarding this Privacy Policy:
